emails.subject: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker
emails.body: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker Joe Gold has kept you informed of our discussions with NYMEX. Please see First Draft attached of our understanding of this meeting. Joe Robertson of our New York office 001 212 715 5254 is fully aware of our ideas and has (as far as metals are concerned) good contacts at NYMEX. We would suggest that you engage him as the metals futures specialist in your further discussions with NYMEX. We have had some further telecon discussions with NYMEX and will modify this first draft and, of course, send you final copy we transmit to NYMEX. Best regards Mike Hutchinson

emails.subject: RE: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker
emails.body: RE: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker We are happy to lead the negotiations on this matter, but would really value your support. We will keep you informed of progress and hopefully meet NYMEX together in the short term. Thanks Mike

emails.subject: RE: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker
emails.body: RE: NYMEX Aluminium Market Maker Mike, That's fine, but no LOI is to be agreed without EnronOnline's concurrence. If you want to do something without us, go right ahead but if we are to be involved then we need to approve and be involved in the deal from the get go. Bob Shults is contacting Joe in NY as we speak. Thanks, Andy Zipper
